metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Base name used for deployed resources.
Foundry model deployment name used by all agents.
SKU used by the Foundry model deployment for the agents. Use GlobalStandard for serverless deployments; use a provisioned SKU only if it is available for the model and region.
Capacity units for the Foundry model deployment used by the agents. Increase this when agents fail with no_capacity during peak load.
Cohere Command A model name in Foundry catalog.
Cohere Command A model version.
Foundry deployment name for Cohere embed-v-4-0.
Cohere embed model name in Foundry catalog.
Cohere embed model version.
Capacity units for the Cohere embed deployment. Increase this for faster case evidence indexing and fewer throttling failures.
Foundry deployment name for Cohere-rerank-v4.0-pro.
Cohere rerank model name in Foundry catalog.
Cohere rerank model version.
Capacity units for the Cohere rerank deployment. Increase this for faster retrieval reranking and fewer throttling failures.
Blob container for uploaded loan documents.
Agent memory store name.
Azure AI Search SKU for demo retrieval indexes.
Full container image URI for the API host.
Full container image URI for the MCP host.
Full container image URI for the agent provisioning job.
Optional suffix for retry deployments. Set when redeploying after a partial failure left names reserved.

dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('foundryAccountName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('foundryAccountName')), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-mcp-identity-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('deploymentSuffix'))), 'CognitiveServicesUser', parameters('nameSuffix')))]

[extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('searchServiceName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('searchServiceName')), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-mcp-identity-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('deploymentSuffix'))), 'SearchServiceContributor', parameters('nameSuffix')))]

[extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('searchServiceName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('searchServiceName')), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-mcp-identity-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('deploymentSuffix'))), 'SearchIndexDataContributor', parameters('nameSuffix')))]

resources.name: [variables('provisioningJobName')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('foundryAccountName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('foundryAccountName')), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-provision-identity-{1}', parameters('baseName'), variables('deploymentSuffix'))), 'CognitiveServicesContributor', parameters('nameSuffix')))]

properties.scriptContent:
set -euo pipefail
      az extension add --name containerapp --upgrade 2>/dev/null || true
      echo "Waiting for role assignments and Foundry deployments to settle..."
      sleep 180
      echo "Starting policy seed job..."
      EXECUTION=$(az containerapp job start --name "${POLICY_SEED_JOB_NAME}" --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" --query name -o tsv)
      echo "Policy seed job execution: ${EXECUTION}"

      for i in $(seq 1 120); do
        STATUS=$(az containerapp job execution show \
          --name "${POLICY_SEED_JOB_NAME}" \
          --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" \
          --job-execution-name "${EXECUTION}" \
          --query properties.status -o tsv)

        echo "Policy seed job status: ${STATUS}"

        if [ "${STATUS}" = "Succeeded" ]; then
          echo "Policy seeding completed successfully."
          exit 0
        fi

        if [ "${STATUS}" = "Failed" ]; then
          echo "Policy seed job failed. Fetching recent job logs..."
          az containerapp job logs show \
            --name "${POLICY_SEED_JOB_NAME}" \
            --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" \
            --execution "${EXECUTION}" \
            --container policy-seed \
            --tail 50 || true
          exit 1
        fi

        sleep 15
      done

      echo "Timed out waiting for policy seed job."
      exit 1

set -euo pipefail
      echo "Waiting briefly for role assignment propagation..."
      sleep 60
      echo "Starting agent provisioning job..."
      EXECUTION=$(az containerapp job start --name "${PROVISIONING_JOB_NAME}" --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" --query name -o tsv)
      echo "Job execution: ${EXECUTION}"

      for i in $(seq 1 120); do
        STATUS=$(az containerapp job execution show \
          --name "${PROVISIONING_JOB_NAME}" \
          --resource-group "${RESOURCE_GROUP}" \
          --job-execution-name "${EXECUTION}" \
          --query properties.status -o tsv)

        echo "Provisioning job status: ${STATUS}"

        if [ "${STATUS}" = "Succeeded" ]; then
          echo "Agent provisioning completed successfully."
          exit 0
        fi

        if [ "${STATUS}" = "Failed" ]; then
          echo "Agent provisioning job failed."
          exit 1
        fi

        sleep 15
      done

      echo "Timed out waiting for agent provisioning job."
      exit 1
